Summary

Strategic marketing manager with 7+ years of experience driving brand growth for B2B SaaS companies. Expert in content marketing, demand generation, and cross-functional team leadership.

Professional Experience

Senior Marketing Manager — HubSpot Chicago, IL 2021-03 – Present
  • Grew organic blog traffic from 2M to 5M monthly visits through SEO strategy overhaul
  • Launched partner co-marketing program generating $8M pipeline in first year
  • Managed $2.5M annual budget across paid, organic, and events channels
